name: promptworld
description: PromptWorld — the first SkillWizard: an Archwizard that has every skill plus a native subagent per component type (skill / mcp / harness / operating_system / prompt / team / cave_team / workflow), and 8 PromptGym wizard AIOS agents, that compile / compose / publish prompt systems through the SkillTome (legacy name: nomicon). Bundles the install-promptworld deploy wizard (the agent builds the docker image, boots the container running the Archwizard + PromptGym + the assistant-ui chat / Monaco file explorer / embedded terminal, copies the Claude creds in, and hands the user one URL), wield-the-tome (the SkillTome ops), compile-a-world (the meta-compiler skill — the tome folds on itself), and ingest-into-tome-app.
